blended.narrative: Lutsen Mountains is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 50 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
